t: How many tally marks are shown? <svg width="113" height="30" viewBox="0 0 113 30" style="display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle;margin:0 4px"><line x1="5" y1="3" x2="5" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="13" y1="3" x2="13" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="21" y1="3" x2="21" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="29" y1="3" x2="29" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="3" y1="27" x2="29" y2="3" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="45" y1="3" x2="45" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="53" y1="3" x2="53" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="61" y1="3" x2="61" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="69" y1="3" x2="69" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="43" y1="27" x2="69" y2="3" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="85" y1="3" x2="85" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="93" y1="3" x2="93" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/><line x1="101" y1="3" x2="101" y2="27" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
A bar graph shows 12 apples and 18 oranges. How many fruits in all?
A tally chart shows 25 votes for cats and 13 for dogs. How many more chose cats?
In a pictograph, each picture = 2 students. There are 5 pictures. How many students?
